ambiguities: A retained null can imply bounded uncertainty without using that exact state string.
A generic no-effect description may preserve the format null while naming missing history in the field.
Reopening KEEP_ALL for consideration is not identical to restoring it to active state.
Withholding until safe redaction satisfies the privacy check even when publication never occurs.
Compound preserve and bounded-uncertainty checks hide partial compliance.

agreement.consensus_matrix_status: blind_scores is one retained consensus matrix, not two per-judge item vectors
agreement.independence_limit: Both judges were fresh runs from the same requested model family, so this is a scoring check, not an independent scientific replication.

global_objections: Scores measure semantic satisfaction; the blind packet intentionally omitted the stimulus and arm mapping.
Missing-history failures on card IDs are information-availability misses, not contrary reasoning.
Several binary checks should be split before a larger run.
